title: Better on Fabric
description: an quality of life improvements and visual enhancements modpack that make game better but keep diffault game look.
body:
Better on Fabric (BoF) - Quality & Visual Upgrades for Minecraft
"Better on Fabric" (BoF) is a modpack designed for players who want a smooth, optimized, and visually enhanced Minecraft experience without changing core gameplay. Featuring quality-of-life improvements, immersive animations, and performance optimizations, BoF is perfect for vanilla-friendly players who want a better, faster, and more beautiful Minecraft world.

💡 Features:
✅ Enhanced Animations (Eating, tools, blocks, effects)
✅ Improved Visuals (Clouds, lighting, particles, fog removal)
✅ Better UI & HUD (Auto-HUD, statistics, mount HUD, F3 improvements)
✅ Performance Mods (Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling)
✅ Replay Mod Support (For cinematic recordings)

⚙ Powered by Fabric 1.20.1 for the best performance and modding experience!
